name: Qualified Subchapter S Trust (QSST) Election

eligibility.description: Trust must have only one income beneficiary and distribute all income currently to a US citizen or resident.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Enables certain trusts to hold S-Corp stock by electing to treat the beneficiary as the owner, facilitating estate planning while maintaining S-Corp status.
